Welcome.title: Welcome to Letreiro.org — Your Online LED Marquee Generator
Welcome.description: Letreiro.org is a browser-based LED marquee generator that lets you create LED-style digital signs instantly. A virtual alternative to physical LED panels, LED boards and luminous signs — no hardware cost, no installation. Perfect for shops, events and personal messages, with custom text, adjustable colors, scrolling speed control, effects and full-screen mode. No downloads, no signup — turn any device into an online LED display.

WhatIs.title: What is an Online LED Marquee?
WhatIs.description: An online LED marquee is the digital version of a physical LED display, running entirely in your browser. You type the text, adjust colors and speed, and generate a virtual LED sign ready to share announcements, promotions or fun messages — a modern, free alternative to traditional luminous signs, electronic boards and LED panels. Ideal for shops, events, social media and any occasion where you want to grab attention with scrolling text.

Features.title: Key Features of the Letreiro Digital Simulator

items.title: Custom Text Input
items.description: Type your message into the text box and watch it come to life on the display. Create personalized digital signs for any occasion.

items.title: Adjustable Text and Background Colors
items.description: Choose from a full color spectrum for both text and background, creating a high-contrast, vibrant look that matches your brand or style.

items.title: Scrolling Speed Control
items.description: Adjust the speed to create the perfect scrolling effect for your message. Slow it down for easier reading, or speed it up to create excitement and urgency.

items.title: Flip and Reverse Display Options
items.description: Add extra style with flip and reverse options to make your message more engaging. These settings let you change the look of your display instantly.

items.title: Full-Screen Mode
items.description: Maximize your impact by switching to full-screen mode — turn any screen into a full-scale LED signboard, ideal for events or high-traffic areas.

LedPage.h1: Online LED Sign — Free Marquee Generator in the Browser
LedPage.subTitle: Create an LED sign with scrolling text for shops, events or social media. A virtual alternative to physical LED panels, LED boards and luminous signs — right in the browser, with no hardware and no signup. Customize colors, speed and effects of your digital LED display.

LEDFeatures.title: How the Online LED Marquee Works

items.title: Dot Matrix Simulation
items.description: Our online LED marquee replicates a traditional LED scrolling display using the principles of dot matrix and diode simulation. A physical LED display uses rows and columns of light-emitting diodes (LEDs) that turn on and off individually to form patterns, characters, and animations.

items.title: Web Technology Implementation
items.description: This online version recreates that behavior using modern web technologies — HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — right in your browser.

items.title: Digital Array System
items.description: Under the hood, the simulator is a two-dimensional array where each element represents a diode in the dot matrix. A "1" means the diode is on, a "0" means it's off.

items.title: Dynamic Pattern Generation
items.description: Each character is encoded into the matrix format, creating a pattern for every letter or symbol. These patterns are then rendered in real time on the simulated LED grid.

HowToUse.title: How to Use Letreiro Digital to Create LED-Style Displays

steps.description: Start by typing your text into the text box. Letreiro Digital handles anything from short announcements to longer messages.
Pick colors for the text and background — choose shades that match your brand or the theme you want to convey.
Set the ideal speed for your message. Whether you want slow, readable text or a faster, dynamic scroll, you get full control.
Experiment with flip and reverse settings to add depth and visual interest to your display.
Use full-screen mode to take over your display — ideal for public areas, shops, and events where you want maximum visibility.

WhyChoose.title: Why Choose Letreiro Digital for Your LED Display?

items.title: No Downloads Required
items.description: Letreiro Digital runs right in your browser — use it on any device, no installation needed.

items.title: Intuitive Interface
items.description: A simple layout that lets anyone create an online LED display, no technical knowledge required.

items.title: Multiple Applications
items.description: From shop promotions to personal messages, Letreiro Digital adapts to any need.

DesignTips.title: Design Tips for an Effective LED Display

tips.description: Use concise phrases to make sure your message gets read quickly.
Pair contrasting text and background colors to keep your message readable from a distance.
Match speed to your audience — slower for information, faster to grab attention.
Experiment with flip and reverse options to make your message stand out.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Letreiro Digital

questions.question: Is Letreiro Digital free?
questions.answer: Yes — all basic features are completely free, with no fees or subscription.

questions.question: Does it work on mobile devices?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Letreiro Digital is optimized for phones and tablets, and works on any device with a browser.

questions.question: Can I use Letreiro Digital for public displays?
questions.answer: Yes. With full-screen mode, Letreiro Digital can be used for digital signage in shops, events, or other public spaces.

questions.question: Does it work offline?
questions.answer: No. Letreiro Digital needs an internet connection since it's an online platform.

questions.question: Can I show it on external screens?
questions.answer: Yes. Letreiro Digital can be shown on any screen connected to your device — external monitors, projectors, or smart TVs.

LEDFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions about the Online LED Marquee

questions.question: What is an online LED marquee?
questions.answer: It's a tool to create scrolling text effects that mimic traditional LED displays. It helps shops and creators generate eye-catching digital signage right in the browser, with vibrant colors and customizable settings.

questions.question: How do I customize the scrolling text?
questions.answer: Type your text, pick the colors, and adjust the scroll speed in the simulator. The live preview shows you in real time how the LED marquee will look.

questions.question: What are the benefits of an online LED marquee?
questions.answer: Create eye-catching announcements, promote events, and share information in an engaging format. The intuitive interface makes it ideal for shops, schools, and events.

questions.question: Is there a character limit?
questions.answer: There's no hard limit, but longer texts take more time to scroll across the screen. We recommend keeping the message concise for the best visual impact.

questions.question: Can I simulate different LED effects?
questions.answer: Yes. The simulator offers effects like flashing, blinking, and different scrolling styles. You can preview them in real time before using them.

questions.question: Is the online LED marquee free?
questions.answer: Yes. All the main features for creating digital signs with scrolling text are completely free.

LojaPage.h1: Free LED Sign for Stores · Online Digital Signage
LojaPage.subTitle: Create a custom LED sign for your store in minutes. Online digital signage with animated messages to catch your customers' attention: OPEN, SALE, promotions, holiday campaigns. No hardware, no install, no signup — runs in the browser on any screen. Use it on the shop computer, an old phone in the window, or an old TV mounted on the wall.

LojaFeatures.title: Why use a digital sign in your store

items.title: Catches the eye of passersby
items.description: An animated sign with scrolling text grabs the attention of people walking past your window or door. Retail studies show that signs with motion get far higher viewing rates than static printed posters.

items.title: Change the message in seconds
items.description: Instead of printing a new poster for every promotion, just edit the digital sign's text. Swap "OPEN" for "50% SALE" or "CLOSED" instantly, as many times a day as you want.

items.title: Uses screens you already own
items.description: Use an old phone, tablet, laptop, or a TV connected via HDMI. No need to buy a physical LED panel — those cost anywhere from $100 to $1,000 depending on size. The online LED sign is completely free.

items.title: Customize colors, speed and effects
items.description: Pick colors that match your store's branding, adjust scroll speed for long or short messages, and use effects like blur or realistic LED mode to stand out.

LojaWhenToUse.title: When to use an LED sign in your store

items.title: Show that the shop is OPEN or CLOSED
items.description: Place a phone or tablet in the window showing "OPEN" in green, then swap to "CLOSED" in red at the end of the day. Customers walking by late know right away whether it's worth coming in.

items.title: Announce flash sales and promotions
items.description: Weekend deals, stock clearance, tiered discounts. Edit the sign in seconds to "30% OFF TODAY ONLY" and trigger impulse purchases from people walking past.

items.title: Black Friday, Christmas and seasonal campaigns
items.description: For Black Friday or Christmas campaigns, a digital sign reinforces the message without the cost of printing new posters every week. Set themed colors (red/green for Christmas) and change them quickly when the campaign ends.

items.title: Grand openings and new arrivals
items.description: New store opening? New product line in stock? Use the sign with an attention-grabbing message like "NEW ARRIVALS" or "GRAND OPENING" to build curiosity in the first days.

LojaHowTo.title: How to create a store LED sign in 3 steps

steps.description: In the simulator above, type the text you want on the sign. Use uppercase letters to emphasize important words (SALE, OPEN, CHRISTMAS) or full phrases like "BIG END-OF-YEAR SALE". The sign shows the text in a continuous scroll.

Choose text and background colors that match your store's identity. Green and red work well for OPEN/CLOSED. Yellow on black grabs attention for SALE. Adjust scroll speed to match text length: faster for short phrases, slower for long ones.

steps.step: 3. Display it on a phone or screen in the window
steps.description: Open the sign in the browser of an old phone, tablet, or TV (via HDMI from a computer). Use the "Fullscreen" button to hide the browser bar and show only the sign. Position the device facing the street.

LojaCompare.title: Digital sign vs. printed poster and physical LED panel
LojaCompare.intro: Is it worth replacing your printed poster or physical LED panel with an online digital sign? Here are the practical differences for small and medium retail.

items.title: Cost: $0 vs. $10-1,000
items.description: A printed poster costs $1 to $10 each (and wears out over time). A decent physical LED panel costs $100 to $1,000. The online digital sign is completely free, and you only need a screen you already own.

items.title: Time to change the message
items.description: Printed poster: print and swap takes hours. Physical panel: dedicated software, sometimes complicated. Online sign: type the new text and the message changes instantly.

items.title: Motion and animation
items.description: Printed posters are static and lose impact after a few days. Physical panels have animation but are expensive. Digital signs offer scrolling text and visual effects (realistic LED mode, blur) that keep customer attention.

items.title: Existing screens
items.description: You can use an old phone, tablet, laptop, or unused TV. Just open the site and switch to fullscreen. No physical install, no holes in the wall, no wiring.

LojaFAQ.title: Frequently asked questions about store LED signs

questions.question: Do I need to install any software to use the LED sign for my store?
questions.answer: No. The sign runs directly in your browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) on a computer, phone, or tablet. Just open the site, type your message and switch to fullscreen. No downloads, no install, no signup.

questions.question: Can I use an old phone in the window as a sign?
questions.answer: Yes, and it's one of the most practical setups. Open the sign in the old phone's browser, switch to fullscreen mode, plug the phone into a charger, and place it in the window facing the street. It runs all day.

questions.question: How do I make the sign show "SALE" or another message?
questions.answer: Type your text into the simulator's input field (for example: SALE 50% OFF). The sign will display the message in a continuous scroll. You can change it as many times as you want throughout the day.

questions.question: Does the sign work offline once it's loaded?
questions.answer: After the page loads, the sign keeps running even if the connection drops temporarily — as long as you don't close the browser or refresh the page. For continuous window use, we recommend a stable Wi-Fi connection.

questions.question: Can I share my sign's configuration with another store?
questions.answer: Yes. The configuration (text, colors, speed) is encoded directly in the URL. Just copy the address and send it via WhatsApp or email — whoever opens it sees the same sign configured.

LojaRelated.title: Keep exploring
LojaRelated.intro: More ways to use the online LED sign:

led.title: → Realistic LED Mode
led.description: Try the realistic LED panel simulation with dot-matrix, glow, and a real LED feel.

home.title: → Home · Simulator
home.description: Go back to the home page and explore all the digital sign simulator's features.

AnimadoPage.h1: Animated Text Sign Online · Scrolling Marquee with Visual Effects
AnimadoPage.subTitle: Create an animated sign with continuously scrolling text, LED glow, and blur effects. Perfect for shop windows, Instagram stories, TikTok videos, parties, and any moment you need to grab attention with motion. No hardware, no signup, runs in your browser.

AnimadoFeatures.title: Why use an animated sign instead of static text

items.title: Motion catches the eye better than static text
items.description: The human eye is wired to detect movement. A continuously scrolling animated sign gets far higher viewing rates than static posters — true for shop windows as well as Instagram stories.

items.title: Multiple built-in effects
items.description: Use default mode (smooth scrolling text), Blur mode (stylized blur effect), or realistic LED mode (dot-matrix with glow). Each effect gives a different feel to the same text.

items.title: No animation software needed
items.description: No After Effects, no Premiere, no motion-design tools. Type the text, pick the effect, and the sign animates live in the browser.

items.title: Instant customization
items.description: Change colors, speed, font, and effect in seconds. See the result animating live as you tweak — no rendering, no waiting.

AnimadoWhenToUse.title: Where to use an animated sign

items.title: Stories and Reels on social media
items.description: Screen-record the scrolling sign and use it as a background in Instagram Stories, Reels, TikTok, or Shorts. The motion keeps viewers watching until the end.

items.title: Shop window with a moving message
items.description: Place a phone or tablet in the window with an animated sign. Passersby get hooked by the motion and read the message — far higher conversion than a static poster.

items.title: Event screens, parties, and livestreams
items.description: Use the sign on a big screen during parties, corporate events, YouTube livestreams, or services. Welcome messages, sponsor names, or thank-yous scroll continuously.

items.title: Presentations and workplace screens
items.description: Office reception screens, digital bulletin boards at schools, motivational messages at work. The animated sign runs 24/7 without maintenance.

AnimadoHowTo.title: How to create an animated sign in 3 steps

steps.description: In the simulator above, type the message that will scroll continuously. It can be a short phrase (WELCOME, SALE) or a longer text — the animated sign auto-adapts to screen width.
Switch between Default (smooth scroll), Blur (stylized blur effect), or LED (realistic dot-matrix with glow). Each effect transforms the same text completely.
Watch the animation roll while you tweak text color, background color, and scroll speed. When it looks good, copy the URL to save the config or export as GIF/video.

AnimadoCompare.title: Animated sign vs. professional animation and static text
AnimadoCompare.intro: When is it worth using an online animated sign instead of a pro motion-design video or just static text? Compare the three options.

items.title: Visual engagement
items.description: Static text: eyes skip fast. Pro video: high engagement but expensive. Online animated sign: high engagement at zero cost — the sweet spot for recurring content.

items.title: Production cost
items.description: Pro animated video: $50 to $500 per piece. Online animated sign: free, unlimited. For daily-content creators, the saving is huge.

items.title: Time to ready
items.description: After Effects animation: hours or days. Online animated sign: seconds. For daily social posts or shop windows, production time is the deciding factor.

items.title: Editing after the fact
items.description: Rendered video: you reopen the project, edit, and re-render. Online sign: text and colors are live variables — just edit and the animation runs with the new content.

AnimadoFAQ.title: Frequently asked questions about animated signs

questions.question: How do I save the animated sign as a GIF or video?
questions.answer: The simulator has export buttons for GIF (~370 KB, great for WhatsApp and Instagram) and WebM video (~500 KB, supported by TikTok, Reels, and YouTube). Click export — the file downloads automatically.

questions.question: Can I use the animated sign in TikTok or Reels videos?
questions.answer: Yes, and it's one of the most popular use cases. Export as WebM or screen-record the browser. The animated sign works as a background or overlay on top of your main video.

questions.question: Is there a length limit for the animated text?
questions.answer: Text can be up to 100 characters per configuration. For longer texts, the sign keeps animating — just wait for the full message to scroll past before it repeats.

questions.question: Can I share an animated sign configuration?
questions.answer: Yes. The config (text, colors, speed, effect) is encoded in the URL. Copy the address and send it via WhatsApp — whoever opens it sees the same animated sign configured.

questions.question: Does the animated sign work on a big screen?
questions.answer: Yes. Use the fullscreen button to hide the browser bar. The animated sign auto-adapts to resolution — works on projectors, 50\" TVs, event screens, or any display connected via HDMI.

AnimadoRelated.title: Keep exploring
AnimadoRelated.intro: More ways to use the online animated sign:

led.title: → Realistic LED Mode
led.description: Combine animation with realistic LED panel simulation — dot-matrix, glow, and a true LED-marquee feel.

home.title: → Home · Simulator
home.description: Go back to the home page and explore all the digital sign simulator's features.

AniversarioPage.h1: Birthday Sign Online · Animated HAPPY BIRTHDAY Marquee Free
AniversarioPage.subTitle: Create an animated birthday sign with messages like HAPPY BIRTHDAY or the birthday person's name. Perfect for parties, table décor, story videos, and venue screens. Use it on a phone, tablet, or TV — no install, no signup, straight from the browser.

AniversarioFeatures.title: Why use a digital birthday sign

items.title: Instant decoration with a personalized name
items.description: Type the birthday person's name and the message appears animated immediately. No ordering a custom banner or waiting for delivery — everything ready in seconds.

items.title: Matches any party theme
items.description: Pick colors to match the theme: pink for kids' parties, gold for sweet 16, red/black for adult parties. The sign adapts to your décor's look and feel.

items.title: Reusable for every party
items.description: Not disposable. Every birthday in the family or friend group, just change the name and message. Long-term savings vs. buying new décor each time.

items.title: Works on any existing screen
items.description: Living-room TV, old phone, kid's tablet, venue projector. The digital sign runs on any device with a browser — nothing new to buy.

AniversarioWhenToUse.title: When to use a birthday sign

items.title: Kids' birthday party
items.description: Put the living-room TV showing "HAPPY BIRTHDAY [NAME]" in themed colors (princess, superhero, animals). Kids love seeing their own name flashing on screen during the happy-birthday song.

items.title: Adult birthday: 30, 40, or 50 years
items.description: Elegant, modern décor for milestone birthdays. Sober colors (black, gold, silver), personalized message, sits as backdrop in photos throughout the party.

items.title: Sweet 16 / quinceañera
items.description: Message "HAPPY 15 [NAME]" in pink, gold, or the party theme color. Use it on a venue screen so all guests see it during the debutante's entrance.

items.title: Instagram stories wishing someone happy birthday
items.description: Make an animated sign with "HAPPY BIRTHDAY [NAME]", export as video, post to your story. Far more memorable than a static photo with text.

AniversarioHowTo.title: How to create a birthday sign in 3 steps

steps.step: 1. Type the message with the name
steps.description: Write "HAPPY BIRTHDAY [NAME]" or your chosen phrase in the simulator text field. Use uppercase to emphasize — the birthday sign shows the text in continuous scroll.
Pink and gold for kids' or sweet 16 parties, red/black for adult parties, blue/white for baby showers. See the combo live before confirming.

steps.step: 3. Display on the party TV or projector
steps.description: Open the sign in the TV browser (via Chromecast, HDMI, or smart TV browser). Use fullscreen mode for impact. Let it run throughout the party.

AniversarioCompare.title: Digital birthday sign vs. paper banner and traditional décor
AniversarioCompare.intro: Is it worth replacing a paper banner or letter balloons with a digital birthday sign? Compare your décor options.

items.title: Personalization
items.description: Paper banner: name printed once, fixed. Letter balloons: laborious to set up. Digital sign: type the name and it appears animated immediately — no ordering, no waiting.

items.title: Reusability
items.description: Banners and balloons: disposable, single use. Digital sign: the same screen works for every birthday in the family and friend group, for years.

items.title: Total cost
items.description: Custom printed décor: $10 to $50 per party. Letter balloons: $20 to $80. Digital sign: zero recurring cost, infinite parties.

items.title: Motion and visual impact
items.description: Static décor: pretty but passive. Animated digital sign: motion catches guests' eyes and serves as a perfect backdrop for party photos and videos.

AniversarioFAQ.title: Frequently asked questions about birthday signs

questions.question: How do I personalize the birthday person's name on the sign?
questions.answer: Type the name directly in the simulator's text field, along with the message. Example: "HAPPY BIRTHDAY MARIA" or "HAPPY BIRTHDAY PETER". The sign shows the full message in continuous scroll.

questions.question: Can I leave the birthday sign running for the whole party?
questions.answer: Yes. Once the page loads, the sign keeps animating on its own as long as the device is on. Plug it in and let it run throughout the entire birthday party.

questions.question: Does it work on a TV via Chromecast or HDMI?
questions.answer: Yes. Open the site in Chrome on your computer or phone, cast via Chromecast, or plug the computer into the TV via HDMI. The sign goes fullscreen on the TV.

questions.question: Can I save the birthday sign as a video for stories?
questions.answer: Yes. The simulator exports as WebM video (~500 KB) or GIF (~370 KB), formats supported by Instagram, WhatsApp, and TikTok. Use it in your birthday wishes story.

questions.question: What colors match each party theme?
questions.answer: Princess/kids: pink and gold. Superhero: red/blue/yellow. Sweet 16: pink, gold, white. Sober adult: black, gold, silver. Baby shower: pastel blue or pink. Try combos live in the simulator.

led.description: Simulate a real LED panel for the party, with physical dot-matrix and the glow of a true LED marquee.

NatalPage.h1: Christmas Sign Online · MERRY CHRISTMAS Animated in Red and Green
NatalPage.subTitle: Create an animated Christmas sign with messages like MERRY CHRISTMAS, HAPPY HOLIDAYS, or CHRISTMAS SALE. Traditional holiday colors (red, green, gold), bright LED effects. Ideal for shops during the holidays, home decoration, festive videos, or TV background during Christmas dinner.

NatalFeatures.title: Why use a digital Christmas sign

items.title: Traditional Christmas colors ready to go
items.description: Red, green, gold, and white in combinations that scream Christmas. No need to think about palettes — pick a combo and the Christmas sign looks festive in seconds.

items.title: Easy update for New Year
items.description: After Christmas, just edit the message to "HAPPY 2027" or "HAPPY NEW YEAR". The same digital décor works for both holidays without reprinting anything.

items.title: No need to buy expensive holiday décor
items.description: Banners, light panels, and Christmas decorations cost $10 to $100 per season. The online Christmas sign is free — save your budget for more presents.

items.title: Pairs with physical string lights
items.description: Use the digital sign next to traditional Christmas string lights. The simulator's LED effect complements physical lights, creating a coherent display with animated text.

NatalWhenToUse.title: Where to use a Christmas sign

items.title: Shop window in December
items.description: Messages like "MERRY CHRISTMAS", "30% OFF CHRISTMAS SALE", or "OPEN UNTIL 10 PM CHRISTMAS EVE" on a phone or tablet in the window. Pulls in last-minute holiday shoppers walking past.

items.title: Christmas dinner table décor
items.description: Tablet or small TV in the dining room showing "MERRY CHRISTMAS [FAMILY NAME]" during dinner. Creates a festive vibe and serves as a perfect photo backdrop for family pictures.

items.title: Christmas sales and holiday Black Friday
items.description: Online or brick-and-mortar shops use the animated Christmas sign to highlight holiday deals. "CHRISTMAS: UP TO 50% OFF" or "FREE SHIPPING UNTIL 12/24" in continuous scroll.

items.title: TV background for festive photos
items.description: Let the Christmas sign run on the TV during dinner so family photos have an animated holiday backdrop. More charming than static decoration.

NatalHowTo.title: How to create a Christmas sign in 3 steps

steps.description: Type "MERRY CHRISTMAS", "HAPPY HOLIDAYS", "MERRY CHRISTMAS & HAPPY NEW YEAR", or a holiday promotion. Use uppercase for impact — the Christmas sign shows the text in continuous scroll.
Classic combos: red text on dark green, white text on red, gold text on black. Watch the animation live and adjust until it looks festive.

steps.step: 3. Enable LED mode for the string-lights effect
steps.description: LED mode simulates a glowing dot-matrix — visually similar to traditional Christmas string lights. Pair it with physical string lights for a cohesive holiday look.

NatalCompare.title: Digital Christmas sign vs. printed décor and physical lights
NatalCompare.intro: Is it worth adding a digital Christmas sign to your traditional decoration? Compare with the classics.

items.title: Reusable décor year after year
items.description: Printed "MERRY CHRISTMAS" banner: gets wrinkled, fades, needs reprinting every year. Digital sign: use it every holiday season for years, easy update to New Year at no cost.

items.title: Complements traditional string lights
items.description: String lights set the mood but carry no message. The digital sign adds animated text (MERRY CHRISTMAS, SALES, family messages) to your existing light setup.

items.title: Zero recurring cost
items.description: New holiday décor: $10 to $100 per season. Physical LED shop panel: $100+. Digital sign: zero cost, no wear, no storage after Christmas.

items.title: Shareable as a digital card
items.description: Create a personalized "MERRY CHRISTMAS" sign, export as GIF or video, and send via WhatsApp to family. Modern, animated, free Christmas card.

NatalFAQ.title: Frequently asked questions about Christmas signs

questions.question: Can I use the Christmas sign for New Year too?
questions.answer: Yes. After Christmas, just edit the message to "HAPPY 2027" or "HAPPY NEW YEAR". Holiday colors (red/green) still work, or switch to gold/white for New Year.

questions.question: What Christmas message works best in a shop?
questions.answer: Direct messages sell more: "30% OFF CHRISTMAS SALE", "FREE SHIPPING UNTIL 12/24", "OPEN UNTIL 10 PM CHRISTMAS EVE". Goodwill messages ("MERRY CHRISTMAS") work better after business hours.

questions.question: How do I pair the sign with physical string lights?
questions.answer: Position the phone/tablet showing the Christmas sign right next to your traditional string lights. Use LED mode for a visually similar effect — the combo looks cohesive as holiday lighting.

questions.question: Can I send the Christmas sign as a card via WhatsApp?
questions.answer: Yes. Export as GIF (~370 KB) or WebM video (~500 KB) — formats supported by WhatsApp. Or copy the URL and send the link directly; whoever opens it sees the sign animating live.

questions.question: Do red/green colors work on any background?
questions.answer: Red on dark green is the classic (high contrast, easy to read from afar). White on red also works well. Avoid red on light green — weak contrast hurts readability.

NatalRelated.title: Keep exploring
NatalRelated.intro: More ways to use the digital sign for the holiday season:

led.title: → Realistic LED Mode
led.description: Simulate a holiday LED panel with a glowing dot-matrix — visually similar to traditional string lights.

Footer.title: Letreiro Digital
Footer.subTitle: Welcome to Letreiro Digital — your online LED marquee simulator.

privacyPolicy.1-p: Letreiro Digital operates the website https://letreiro.org and is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy outlines how we handle information when you use our online LED display simulator.
privacyPolicy.2-p-1: We do not collect any personal identification information from users. Our service is designed to be used without requiring personal data.
privacyPolicy.2-p-3: We collect non-personal data through web cookies, including usage statistics and preferences, to improve our service and user experience. This may include your display settings and customization preferences.
privacyPolicy.3-p: Any collected non-personal data is used solely to enhance the functionality of our LED display simulator and improve user experience. We do not share any data with third parties.
privacyPolicy.6-p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@letreiro.org.
